name: Veggie Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 4 small yellow squash, sliced into thick rounds
1 tablespoon Italian herb mix (such as oregano, sage, marjoram, thyme, savory, basil, rosemary)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place vegetables in a large bowl.
2. Add remaining ingredients and marinate for 2 hours at room temperature.
3. Arrange vegetables on skewers.
4. Grill or broil for 7 to 10 minutes, turning frequently.
